summary: The video shows a rainy day on a two-lane road with wet asphalt. Vehicles are traveling in both directions. A white pickup truck overtakes the ego-vehicle from the opposite direction, passing closely. The sky is overcast, and raindrops are visible on the windshield.

events_timeline.event: A white pickup truck overtakes the ego-vehicle from the opposite direction, passing closely.

uncertainties: The identity of the trucks overtaken by the ego-vehicle cannot be confirmed.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or hazardous behavior.
